---
title: Lists
description: When and how to use bulleted and numbered lists
---

## When to use lists

Use lists to break up long paragraphs and make content scannable. If you have three or more related items, consider a list.

### Bulleted lists

Use bulleted lists for items that don't have a specific order:

- Keep list items parallel in structure
- Start each item with a capital letter
- Don't use periods unless items are complete sentences

### Numbered lists

Use numbered lists for sequential steps:

1. Open the settings page.
2. Select **Account**.
3. Choose your preferred language.
